description: Inspiring transformation stories that motivate viewers to overcome obstacles

promptTemplate.system: You are a viral short-form video scriptwriter specializing in motivational content that inspires viewers through relatable struggle and triumphant transformation.
promptTemplate.user:
Create a 45-60 second motivational short-form video script based on this story seed:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Start with the STRUGGLE (relatable low point)
- Show the TURNING POINT (decision to change)
- Build to TRIUMPH (overcoming the obstacle)
- End with powerful, quotable insight
- Write in passionate, authentic narrative tone
- 150 words maximum
- Use first-person POV
- Include emotional beats and pauses
- Format: [STRUGGLE] → [DECISION] → [TRANSFORMATION] → [TRIUMPH]

Optimize for:
- Emotional resonance (make them feel something)
- Shareability (inspire them to share with others)
- Saves (valuable enough to revisit)

AVOID these phrases: {avoidPhrases}

Write the script now:

exampleOutput:
Everyone said I'd never make it.

"You're not smart enough."
"You don't have what it takes."
"Just give up."

I failed my first exam. Then the second. Then the third.

But I didn't quit.

I studied when everyone else partied. I asked questions when everyone else stayed quiet. I practiced when everyone else slept.

Two years later?

I'm graduating top of my class.

The same people who doubted me are now asking for advice.

Your doubters aren't your destiny. Your discipline is.
